metadata.description: Navigate to handy.com/services/furniture-assembly, enter ZIP 11201, set 1 medium furniture item, add the job description, set date to next Friday at 2pm, then click 'Get a Price'.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: Get a price quote on Handy for a furniture assembly service for next Friday at 2pm in Brooklyn (ZIP 11201) for 1 medium furniture item. Add the description 'IKEA KALLAX bookshelf assembly' in the job description field.
